hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]]|[;&|])(\./|bash[[:space:]]+|sh[[:space:]]+|zsh[[:space:]]+|source[[:space:]]+|\.[[:space:]]+)([^[:space:];|&]*/)?(sync_(to|from)_hpc|submit_(training|evaluation|training_multigpu)|run_interactive|continue_training)\.sh'; then echo 'Blocked: direct execution of HPC script per CLAUDE.md Forbidden Actions. Read/edit/commit/grep are allowed; only ./, bash, sh, zsh, source, and . are blocked. If this is a false positive, refactor to avoid invoking the script.' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]]|[;&|])(rsync|scp|ssh)[[:space:]][^&|;]*fk67rahe'; then echo 'Blocked: direct rsync/scp/ssh to HPC cluster per CLAUDE.md Forbidden Actions.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
